adHAS was in Felis again!

The Felis Awards,

organized to emphasize the role of effective creativity in marketing activities in the advertising and marketing industry and to reward the success of all teams that contribute to the creative world, found their owners on November 9th and 10th!

Our graduates

received awards for their agencies and works.

Additionally, our students

were also among the award recipients!

We congratulate our graduates and students and wish them continued success.
